name: Age Calculator
desc: Calculate your exact age in years and the days until your next birthday.
seo_title: Age Calculator – How Old Am I? Online
seo_description: Age Calculator: enter your values and get instant, accurate results. Free to use, no sign-up and no hassle.
result_context: Edad current in years, months vividos, and days to próximo cumpleaños
formula_display: Edad = year current - year nacimiento (ajustado per month/day)
steps: Ajustar if cumpleaños not ha ocurrido this year
mistakes: Not considering if the cumpleaños already pasó this year
